name: prd-writer
description: Structured PRD authoring toolkit for games, AI agents, SaaS/Ops tools, data products, platform products, growth products, and learning products. Includes implementation-detail boundaries, product-type routing, evidence metadata, exception coverage, inline Mermaid diagrams, audience splits, Obsidian/Word/PDF/Confluence export profiles, HTML PRD export with split-doc support, and interactive HTML mockup prototype generation.
